title: cyperus dewildeorum
intro: Cyperus dewildeorum, also known as Dwarf Papyrus or Wild Caper Sedge, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Cyperus dewildeorum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
